tools.name: search_activities
tools.title: Search FamilyFun activities
tools.description: Search family activities from the FamilyFun catalog (Poland — mainly the Warsaw and Silesia regions). Filter by city/region, category/tag, indoor/outdoor, or a free-text query matched against title, location, tags and description.

query.description: Free-text query matched against title, location, tags, description.

city.description: Region slug filter: 'warszawa' (Warsaw area) or 'slask' (Silesian agglomeration). Smaller towns appear under their own city values — use `list_cities` for full coverage and the free-text query to match them.

indoor.description: If true, only indoor. If false, only outdoor.

tools.name: get_activity
tools.title: Get FamilyFun activity details
tools.description: Fetch full details for one FamilyFun activity by its slug (e.g. 'warszawa-zoo-warszawskie').

tools.name: list_cities
tools.title: List FamilyFun cities
tools.description: List Polish cities covered by FamilyFun with activity counts.
